title: rEx
story:
[Meridian-7 Log #025 — Final Signal] rEx sent the ultimate communication package. The format is rEx{TYPE:CONTENT} — the core format of rEx's protocol, integrating every skill you've learned. Once you parse this data, the communication protocol is fully established. rEx station will refuel Meridian-7.

"All the signals were for this moment."
— rEx
promptChallenge: [Target] rEx{TYPE:CONTENT} messages — the final handshake protocol.
hints: [Hint] TYPE is one or more uppercase letters
[Hint] CONTENT does not contain curly braces
promptHints: Your prompt is the ultimate expression of your regex articulation ability
Use the fewest words to express the most precise intent
rEx believes you can do it

feedback.onPass:
[TRANSMISSION COMPLETE] All of rEx's signals have been decrypted. Communication protocol fully established.

// rEx says: "The protocol between us is established."
feedback.onFail: [Signal Incomplete] The final signal could not be fully parsed. Recall everything you've learned and try again.
feedback.onPerfect: [TRANSMISSION COMPLETE] rEx station opened its arms to Meridian-7. Refueling in progress... but the engine is beyond repair. rEx says: "We can give you a new heart — but you'll need to make it beat."
feedback.onDirectWrite:
[Manual Override — Final] Manual endgame completion. Regardless of the method, you proved yourself.

// rEx says: "The method doesn't matter — understanding does."
